<!doctype html>
<html lang="ko">
<head>
<meta charset="utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover, user-scalable=no" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent" />
<meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
<title>Complæxity HTML Prototype v4</title>
<style>
  :root { --bg:#0a0a0a; --fg:#f4f4f4; --muted:rgba(255,255,255,.68); --panel:rgba(255,255,255,.08); }
  * { box-sizing:border-box; }
  html, body { width:100%; height:100%; }
  body { margin:0; background:var(--bg); color:var(--fg); font-family:-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,'Noto Sans KR',sans-serif; overflow:hidden; }
  #app { position:fixed; inset:0; display:grid; grid-template-rows:auto 1fr auto; }
  .topbar,.bottombar { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; padding:14px 18px; z-index:5; pointer-events:none; }
  .topbar { justify-content:space-between; } .bottombar { justify-content:center; }
  .chip { background:var(--panel); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); border-radius:999px; padding:8px 12px; font-size:12px; letter-spacing:.02em; color:var(--muted); backdrop-filter:blur(10px); }
  #stage { position:relative; display:grid; place-items:center; padding:24px; touch-action:manipulation; }
  canvas { max-width:calc(100vw - 48px); max-height:calc(100vh - 140px); width:auto; height:auto; background:#fff; box-shadow:0 18px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.45); }
  #overlay { position:absolute; inset:0; display:grid; place-items:center; background:rgba(0,0,0,.72); z-index:10; }
  #overlayCard { max-width:620px; margin:24px; padding:24px 26px; border-radius:20px; background:rgba(18,18,18,.95); border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); box-shadow:0 10px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4); }
  #overlay h1 { margin:0 0 10px; font-size:20px; font-weight:600; }
  #overlay p { margin:0 0 10px; color:var(--muted); line-height:1.6; font-size:14px; }
  #controls { margin-top:16px; display:flex; gap:10px; flex-wrap:wrap; }
  button { appearance:none; border:0; cursor:pointer; border-radius:999px; padding:12px 16px; font-size:14px; font-weight:600; }
  .primary { background:#fff; color:#111; } .secondary { background:rgba(255,255,255,.1); color:#fff; } .hidden { display:none !important; }
  #miniControls { position:fixed; right:18px; bottom:18px; display:flex; gap:8px; z-index:6; }
  #miniControls button { background:rgba(255,255,255,.08); color:#fff; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12); padding:10px 12px; font-size:13px; backdrop-filter:blur(10px); }
  #progress { width:min(520px,80vw); height:4px; background:rgba(255,255,255,.08); border-radius:999px; overflow:hidden; }
  #progressBar { width:0%; height:100%; background:linear-gradient(90deg,#fff,#a9b7ff); }
  .mono { font-family:ui-monospace,SFMono-Regular,Menlo,Consolas,monospace; }

  /* iPad / tablet landscape responsive view */
  @supports (height: 100dvh) {
    body, #app { min-height: 100dvh; }
  }

  @media (orientation: landscape) and (max-height: 900px) {
    #app {
      display: block;
      width: 100vw;
      height: 100vh;
      height: 100dvh;
    }
    #stage {
      position: fixed;
      inset: 0;
      width: 100vw;
      height: 100vh;
      height: 100dvh;
      padding: 0;
      display: grid;
      place-items: center;
      overflow: hidden;
    }
    canvas {
      max-width: 100vw;
      max-height: 100vh;
      max-height: 100dvh;
      width: auto;
      height: auto;
      box-shadow: none;
    }
    .topbar {
      position: fixed;
      top: 8px;
      left: 8px;
      right: 8px;
      padding: 0;
      opacity: .38;
      z-index: 7;
    }
    .bottombar {
      position: fixed;
      left: 16px;
      right: 16px;
      bottom: 10px;
      padding: 0;
      opacity: .36;
      z-index: 7;
    }
    .chip {
      padding: 5px 8px;
      font-size: 10px;
      background: rgba(0,0,0,.28);
    }
    #progress {
      width: min(360px, 56vw);
      height: 3px;
      background: rgba(255,255,255,.16);
    }
    #miniControls {
      right: 10px;
      bottom: 10px;
      transform: scale(.86);
      transform-origin: right bottom;
      opacity: .36;
    }
    #miniControls:hover,
    .topbar:hover,
    .bottombar:hover {
      opacity: .95;
    }
    #overlayCard {
      max-width: min(520px, 86vw);
      padding: 18px 20px;
    }
  }

  @media (orientation: portrait) and (max-width: 900px) {
    #stage { padding: 8px; }
    canvas {
      max-width: calc(100vw - 16px);
      max-height: calc(100dvh - 96px);
    }
    .topbar, .bottombar { padding: 8px 10px; }
    #miniControls { right: 10px; bottom: 10px; transform: scale(.9); transform-origin: right bottom; }
  }


  /* v9: 2x text-size view by magnifying the page canvas */
  #stage {
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  canvas {
    transform: scale(2);
    transform-origin: center center;
  }

  @media (orientation: landscape) and (max-height: 900px) {
    canvas {
      transform: scale(2);
      transform-origin: center center;
    }
  }

  @media (orientation: portrait) and (max-width: 900px) {
    canvas {
      transform: scale(1.6);
      transform-origin: center center;
    }
  }


  /* v10: exhibition fullscreen / iPad kiosk view */
  html, body {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    height: 100dvh;
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    background: #000;
    overflow: hidden;
    overscroll-behavior: none;
    touch-action: manipulation;
    -webkit-user-select: none;
    user-select: none;
  }

  #app {
    display: block !important;
    width: 100vw;
    height: 100vh;
    height: 100dvh;
    background: #000;
  }

  .topbar,
  .bottombar,
  #miniControls {
    display: none !important;
    opacity: 0 !important;
    visibility: hidden !important;
    pointer-events: none !important;
  }

  #stage {
    position: fixed !important;
    inset: 0 !important;
    width: 100vw !important;
    height: 100vh !important;
    height: 100dvh !important;
    padding: 0 !important;
    margin: 0 !important;
    display: grid !important;
    place-items: center !important;
    overflow: hidden !important;
    background: #000 !important;
  }

  canvas {
    max-width: none !important;
    max-height: none !important;
    width: auto !important;
    height: 100vh !important;
    height: 100dvh !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
    background: #fff;
    transform: scale(2) !important;
    transform-origin: center center !important;
  }

  #overlay {
    position: fixed !important;
    inset: 0 !important;
    z-index: 20 !important;
    background: #000 !important;
  }

  #overlayCard {
    max-width: min(520px, 82vw) !important;
    background: rgba(18,18,18,.92) !important;
    border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.16) !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;
  }

  #overlay p {
    font-size: 13px !important;
  }


  /* v10 inverted: black background / white text */
  canvas {
    filter: invert(1) !important;
    background: #000 !important;
  }

</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="app">
  <div class="topbar"><div class="chip" id="pageLabel">page 1 / 66</div><div class="chip mono" id="statusLabel">[SYSTEM] standby</div></div>
  <div id="stage"><canvas id="pageCanvas"></canvas>
    <div id="overlay"><div id="overlayCard">
      <h1>Complæxity HTML prototype v10 exhibition fullscreen inverted</h1>
      <p>첫 페이지는 표지처럼 즉시 표시되고, 본문은 실제 타이핑에 가깝게 일정한 속도로 왼쪽에서 오른쪽 순서로 생성됩니다. 짧고 강한 글리치, 페이지 전환 직전 텍스트 잔상, 둔탁한 키보드 타건음을 반영했습니다.</p>
      <p>재생 중 스페이스바를 누르거나 화면을 터치하면 다음 페이지로 넘어갑니다. 사운드는 시작 버튼을 눌러야 재생됩니다.</p>
      <div id="controls"><button class="primary" id="startBtn">시작 / 소리 포함</button><button class="secondary" id="muteBtn">무음으로 보기</button></div>
    </div></div>
  </div>
  <div class="bottombar"><div id="progress"><div id="progressBar"></div></div></div>
</div>
<div id="miniControls" class="hidden"><button id="pauseBtn">일시정지</button><button id="restartBtn">처음부터</button></div>
<script>
window.PAGE_DATA = [{"page": 1, "image": "page_001.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [{"text": "Complæxity ", "bbox": [206.76, 382.34, 410.88, 419.27], "chars": 11}], "charCount": 11, "text": "Complæxity "}, {"page": 2, "image": "page_002.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [], "charCount": 0, "text": ""}, {"page": 3, "image": "page_003.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [{"text": "너와 연결되었을 때 내가 가장 원했던 상태는 해방감으로", "bbox": [120.0, 382.64, 390.12, 393.14], "chars": 30}, {"text": ", ", "bbox": [390.12, 382.64, 397.86, 393.14], "chars": 2}, {"text": "이때의 해방은 연", "bbox": [398.52, 382.64, 480.0, 393.14], "chars": 9}, {"text": "결 그 자체로부터의 해방 또한 포함 된다. ", "bbox": [110.04, 400.64, 307.74, 411.14], "chars": 24}], "charCount": 65, "text": "너와 연결되었을 때 내가 가장 원했던 상태는 해방감으로\n이때의 해방은 연\n, \n결 그 자체로부터의 해방 또한 포함 된다. ", "bbox": [241.08, 382.64, 248.82, 393.14], "chars": 2}], "charCount": 19, "text": "그건 좀\n곤란하겠는데요\n......\n. "}, {"page": 15, "image": "page_015.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [{"text": "“", "bbox": [120.0, 380.54, 124.78, 393.49], "chars": 1}, {"text": "”", "bbox": [149.16, 380.54, 153.94, 393.49], "chars": 1}, {"text": "왜죠", "bbox": [124.8, 382.64, 144.84, 393.14], "chars": 2}, {"text": "?", "bbox": [144.84, 382.64, 149.12, 393.14], "chars": 1}], "charCount": 5, "text": "왜죠\n“\n?\n”"}, {"page": 16, "image": "page_016.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [], "charCount": 0, "text": ""}, {"page": 17, "image": "page_017.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [{"text": "내가 당신의 멱살을 잡을 때만 당신이 나를 기억하니까. "}, {"page": 28, "image": "page_028.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [{"text": "기억해", "bbox": [120.0, 382.64, 150.0, 393.14], "chars": 3}], "charCount": 3, "text": "기억해"}, {"page": 29, "image": "page_029.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [{"text": "홀씨 하나", "bbox": [120.0, 382.64, 165.84, 393.14], "chars": 5}, {"text": ", ", "bbox": [165.96, 382.64, 173.58, 393.14], "chars": 2}, {"text": "크고 단단한 텔레비전 본체에 붙어 있던", "bbox": [174.48, 382.64, 363.72, 393.14], "chars": 21}, {"text": ". ", "bbox": [363.84, 382.64, 371.46, 393.14], "chars": 2}, {"text": "그 텔레비전 본체의 부", "bbox": [372.36, 382.64, 479.88, 393.14], "chars": 12}, {"text": "피는 두꺼웠다", "bbox": [110.04, 398.6, 175.56, 409.1], "chars": 7}, {"text": ". 90", "bbox": [175.68, 398.6, 193.86, 409.1], "chars": 4}, {"text": "년대에서 ", "bbox": [193.92, 398.6, 238.86, 409.1], "chars": 5}, {"text": "2000", "bbox": [239.52, 398.6, 259.5, 409.1], "chars": 4}, {"text": "년대 초반에 보급된 텔레비전으로", "bbox": [259.44, 398.6, 416.16, 409.1], "chars": 17}, {"text": ", ", "bbox": [416.16, 398.6, 423.9, 409.1], "chars": 2}, {"text": "텔레비전 하", "bbox": [424.44, 398.6, 480.0, 409.1], "chars": 6}, {"text": "단부에는 비디오테이프 삽입을 위한 슬롯이 내장되어 있었다. ", "bbox": [110.04, 414.68, 399.56, 425.18], "chars": 33}], "charCount": 120, "text": "홀씨 하나\n크고 단단한 텔레비전 본체에 붙어 있던\n그 텔레비전 본체의 부\n, \n. \n피는 두꺼웠다\n년대에서 \n년대 초반에 보급된 텔레비전으로\n텔레비전 하\n. 90\n2000\n, \n단부에는 비디오테이프 삽입을 위한 슬롯이 내장되어 있었다. 382.64, 240.0, 393.14], "chars": 13}], "charCount": 13, "text": "떠나는 속도를 측정하려고"}, {"page": 62, "image": "page_062.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": ", "bbox": [120.0, 382.64, 157.74, 393.14], "chars": 5}, {"text": "[SYNK ", "bbox": [157.68, 382.65, 187.74, 392.61], "chars": 6}, {"text": "상태", "bbox": [187.68, 382.65, 207.72, 392.61], "chars": 2}, {"text": ": ", "bbox": [207.72, 382.65, 217.74, 392.61], "chars": 2}, {"text": "불안정", "bbox": [217.68, 382.65, 247.68, 392.61], "chars": 3}, {"text": "] ", "bbox": [247.68, 382.65, 257.7, 392.61], "chars": 2}, {"text": "연결이 끊어졌습니다", "bbox": [257.76, 382.65, 352.68, 392.61], "chars": 10}], "charCount": 30, "text": "파랗게. \n상태\n불안정\n연결이 끊어졌습니다\n[SYNK \n: \n] "}, {"page": 63, "image": "page_063.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [], "charCount": 0, "text": ""}, {"page": 64, "image": "page_064.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [{"text": "(", "bbox": [120.0, 382.65, 124.98, 392.61], "chars": 1}, {"text": "재연결을 시도합니다", "bbox": [125.04, 382.65, 219.96, 392.61], "chars": 10}, {"text": ")", "bbox": [220.08, 382.65, 225.06, 392.61], "chars": 1}], "charCount": 12, "text": "재연결을 시도합니다\n(\n)"}, {"page": 65, "image": "page_065.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [], "charCount": 0, "text": ""}, {"page": 66, "image": "page_066.png", "width": 1190, "height": 1684, "pdfWidth": 595.0, "pdfHeight": 842.0, "spans": [{"text": "©", "bbox": [258.12, 728.54, 266.67, 741.49], "chars": 1}, {"text": "2026. ", "bbox": [329.28, 730.64, 337.02, 741.14], "chars": 2}], "charCount": 12, "text": "김해솔\n2026. \n. \n©"}];
window.INLINE_IMAGE_MAP = {"page_001.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_002.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_003.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_004.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_005.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_006.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_007.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_008.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_009.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_010.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_011.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_012.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_013.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_014.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_015.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_016.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_017.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_018.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_019.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_020.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_021.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_022.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_023.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_024.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_025.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_026.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_027.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_028.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_029.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_030.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_031.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_032.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_033.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_034.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_035.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_036.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_037.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_038.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_039.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_040.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_041.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_042.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_043.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_044.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_045.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_046.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_047.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_048.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_049.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_050.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_051.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_052.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_053.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_054.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_055.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_056.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_057.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_058.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_059.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_060.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_061.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_062.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_063.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_064.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_065.png": "data:image/png;base64,", "page_066.png": "data:image/png;base64,"};

(() => {
  const PAGES = window.PAGE_DATA || [];
  const IMAGE_MAP = window.INLINE_IMAGE_MAP || {};

  function orderedSpans(page){
    if (!page || !page.spans) return [];
    return page.spans.slice().sort((a,b) => {
      const ay = a.bbox[1], by = b.bbox[1];
      if (Math.abs(ay - by) > 8) return ay - by;
      return a.bbox[0] - b.bbox[0];
    });
  }
  PAGES.forEach(p => {
    p.spans = orderedSpans(p);
    p.charCount = (p.spans || []).reduce((sum, s) => sum + Math.max(1, s.chars || (s.text || '').length || 1), 0);
  });
  const canvas = document.getElementById('pageCanvas');
  const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');
  const stage = document.getElementById('stage');
  const pageLabel = document.getElementById('pageLabel');
  const statusLabel = document.getElementById('statusLabel');
  const progressBar = document.getElementById('progressBar');
  const overlay = document.getElementById('overlay');
  const startBtn = document.getElementById('startBtn');
  const muteBtn = document.getElementById('muteBtn');
  const miniControls = document.getElementById('miniControls');
  const pauseBtn = document.getElementById('pauseBtn');
  const restartBtn = document.getElementById('restartBtn');

  const config = {
    // Page pacing: short pages take about 6s total, dense pages about 8s total.
    emptyPageMs: 3000,
    shortPageMs: 6000,
    longPageMs: 11000,
    extraLongPageMs: 13000,
    longCharThreshold: 260,
    extraLongCharThreshold: 520,
    minTypeMs: 650,
    maxTypeRatio: 0.84,
    coverHoldMs: 2650,
    holdMs: 520,
    exitMs: 350,
    manualExitMs: 260,
    glitchPulseMs: 190,
    clickVolume: 0.075,
    cursorBlinkMs: 500,
  };

  let images = [];
  let alienLayers = [];
  let currentIndex = 0;
  let phase = 'idle';
  let phaseStart = 0;
  let phaseDuration = 1;
  let paused = false;
  let pauseStarted = 0;
  let rafId = 0;
  let audioCtx = null;
  let masterGain = null;
  let audioEnabled = false;
  let lastRevealedChars = 0;
  let pageStartTime = 0;
  let noiseBuffer = null;
  let currentHoldMs = config.holdMs;
  let lastKeySoundAt = 0;

  function clamp(v,a,b){ return Math.min(b, Math.max(a, v)); }
  function easeInOutQuad(t){ return t < .5 ? 2*t*t : 1 - Math.pow(-2*t + 2, 2)/2; }
  function setPhase(p,d){ phase = p; phaseStart = performance.now(); phaseDuration = d; lastRevealedChars = 0; }
  function isOverlayVisible(){ return !overlay.classList.contains('hidden'); }

  function ensureAudio(){
    if (!audioCtx) {
      audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
      masterGain = audioCtx.createGain();
      masterGain.gain.value = 1.0;
      masterGain.connect(audioCtx.destination);

      const len = Math.floor(audioCtx.sampleRate * 0.11);
      noiseBuffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, len, audioCtx.sampleRate);
      const data = noiseBuffer.getChannelData(0);
      for (let i=0;i<len;i++) {
        const env = Math.pow(1 - i/len, 4.1);
        data[i] = (Math.random()*2-1) * env;
      }
    }
    if (audioCtx.state === 'suspended') audioCtx.resume();
  }

  function playOneKey(offset=0){
    if (!audioEnabled || !audioCtx || !masterGain || !noiseBuffer) return;
    const now = audioCtx.currentTime + offset;

    const src = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
    src.buffer = noiseBuffer;

    const low = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
    low.type = 'lowpass';
    low.frequency.value = 520 + Math.random()*180;
    low.Q.value = 0.35;

    const body = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
    body.type = 'peaking';
    body.frequency.value = 145 + Math.random()*65;
    body.gain.value = 8.5;
    body.Q.value = 0.7;

    const noiseGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    noiseGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now);
    noiseGain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(config.clickVolume, now + 0.006);
    noiseGain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + 0.085);

    src.connect(low).connect(body).connect(noiseGain).connect(masterGain);
    src.start(now);
    src.stop(now + 0.11);

    const thump = audioCtx.createOscillator();
    const thumpGain = audioCtx.createGain();
    thump.type = 'triangle';
    thump.frequency.value = 72 + Math.random()*42;
    thumpGain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.0001, now);
    thumpGain.gain.linearRampToValueAtTime(config.clickVolume * 0.28, now + 0.006);
    thumpGain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001, now + 0.075);
    thump.connect(thumpGain).connect(masterGain);
    thump.start(now);
    thump.stop(now + 0.09);
  }

  function playTypeClick(){
    if (!audioEnabled) return;
    const nowMs = performance.now();
    if (nowMs - lastKeySoundAt < 55 + Math.random()*35) return;
    lastKeySoundAt = nowMs;
    playOneKey(0);
  }

  async function preloadImages(){
    images = await Promise.all(PAGES.map(page => new Promise((resolve,reject)=>{
      const img = new Image(); img.onload = () => resolve(img); img.onerror = reject; img.src = IMAGE_MAP[page.image];
    })));
    alienLayers = PAGES.map((page, idx) => buildAlienLayer(page, idx));
  }

  function unionTextRect(page){
    if (!page.spans || !page.spans.length) return {x:page.pdfWidth*.1, y:page.pdfHeight*.12, w:page.pdfWidth*.8, h:page.pdfHeight*.74};
    let minX=Infinity,minY=Infinity,maxX=-Infinity,maxY=-Infinity;
    for (const s of orderedSpans(page)) { const [x1,y1,x2,y2]=s.bbox; minX=Math.min(minX,x1); minY=Math.min(minY,y1); maxX=Math.max(maxX,x2); maxY=Math.max(maxY,y2); }
    const padX=(maxX-minX)*.04+10, padY=(maxY-minY)*.03+10;
    return {x:Math.max(20,minX-padX), y:Math.max(20,minY-padY), w:Math.min(page.pdfWidth-40,(maxX-minX)+2*padX), h:Math.min(page.pdfHeight-40,(maxY-minY)+2*padY)};
  }
  function seeded(seed){ let s=seed%2147483647; if(s<=0)s+=2147483646; return ()=> (s=s*16807%2147483647)/2147483647; }
  function makeAlienWord(rand, len){
    const tokens = [
      '[SYNK]', '[NULL]', '[ERROR]', '[AE]', '[POS]', '[TRACE]', '[RE:]', '[MEMORY]',
      '0x' + Math.floor(rand()*65535).toString(16).padStart(4,'0'),
      'æ', 'Æ', '∆', '▯', '▒', '░', '※', '⌁', '⌬', '⟡', '⟐', '∴', '∵',
      'INPUT', 'MERGE', 'RESTORE', 'DREAM', 'PORT', 'SELF', 'UNSTABLE',
      '거리불명', '좌표중첩', '번역불가', '복수인스턴스', '동기화실패'
    ];
    let out = [];
    const n = 2 + Math.floor(rand()*5);
    for (let i=0; i<n; i++) out.push(tokens[Math.floor(rand()*tokens.length)]);
    if (rand() < .35) out.push('//');
    if (rand() < .28) out.push('...');
    return out.join(rand() < .35 ? '' : ' ');
  }

  function buildAlienLayer(page,pageIndex){
    const rand=seeded((pageIndex+1)*12107);
    const box=unionTextRect(page);
    const lineCount=5+Math.floor(rand()*5);
    const lines=[];
    for(let i=0;i<lineCount;i++){
      const y=box.y + box.h*(.12 + rand()*.76);
      const x=box.x + box.w*(.02 + rand()*.20);
      const width=box.w*(.52+rand()*.42);
      const fontSize=Math.max(11, Math.min(20, box.h*.035*(.9+rand()*.7)));
      let text='';
      const wordCount=3+Math.floor(rand()*6);
      for(let w=0;w<wordCount;w++) text += makeAlienWord(rand,4+Math.floor(rand()*8)) + '   ';
      lines.push({x,y,width,text:text.trim(),fontSize,jitter:rand()*3.2});
    }
    return {box,lines};
  }

  function resizeCanvasToImage(img){ canvas.width=img.naturalWidth||img.width; canvas.height=img.naturalHeight||img.height; }
  function pageTotalDuration(page){
    const chars = page.charCount || 0;
    if (chars === 0) return config.emptyPageMs;
    if (chars > config.extraLongCharThreshold) return config.extraLongPageMs;
    if (chars > config.longCharThreshold) return config.longPageMs;
    return config.shortPageMs;
  }

  function pageTypeDuration(page){
    const total = pageTotalDuration(page);
    const chars = page.charCount || 0;
    const natural = chars * 52 + 260;
    return clamp(natural, config.minTypeMs, total * config.maxTypeRatio);
  }

  function beginPage(index){
    pageLabel.textContent = `page ${index+1} / ${PAGES.length}`;
    pageStartTime = performance.now();
    lastKeySoundAt = 0;
    resizeCanvasToImage(images[index]);

    if (index === 0) {
      statusLabel.textContent = '[SYSTEM] cover';
      currentHoldMs = 0;
      setPhase('cover', config.coverHoldMs);
      return;
    }

    const total = pageTotalDuration(PAGES[index]);
    const typeMs = pageTypeDuration(PAGES[index]);
    currentHoldMs = Math.max(240, total - typeMs - config.exitMs);
    statusLabel.textContent = '[SYSTEM] typing...';
    setPhase('typing', typeMs);
  }

  function getVisibleChars(page, progress){ return Math.floor((page.charCount||0) * clamp(progress,0,1)); }

  function findCursor(page){
    const scaleX=canvas.width/page.pdfWidth, scaleY=canvas.height/page.pdfHeight; const spans=orderedSpans(page);
    if (!spans.length) return null;
    const s=spans[spans.length-1]; const [x1,y1,x2,y2]=s.bbox;
    return {x:x2*scaleX, y:y1*scaleY, h:Math.max(14,(y2-y1)*scaleY)};
  }

  function drawBasePage(page,img,visibleChars){
    const w=canvas.width,h=canvas.height;
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h); ctx.fillStyle='#fff'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h); ctx.drawImage(img,0,0,w,h);
    const scaleX=w/page.pdfWidth, scaleY=h/page.pdfHeight; let leftChars=visibleChars;
    for(const span of orderedSpans(page)){
      const [x1,y1,x2,y2]=span.bbox; const sx=x1*scaleX, sy=y1*scaleY, sw=(x2-x1)*scaleX, sh=(y2-y1)*scaleY;
      const charLen=Math.max(1,span.chars||(span.text||'').length||1);
      let revealRatio=0; if(leftChars<=0) revealRatio=0; else if(leftChars>=charLen) revealRatio=1; else revealRatio=leftChars/charLen; leftChars -= charLen;
      if(revealRatio<1){ const coverX=sx+sw*revealRatio, coverW=sw*(1-revealRatio); ctx.fillStyle='#fff'; ctx.fillRect(coverX-1,sy-1,coverW+2,sh+2); }
    }
  }

  function drawCursorAfterComplete(page, now){
    if(phase !== 'hold') return;
    const blink=Math.floor(now/config.cursorBlinkMs)%2===0; if(!blink) return; const cur=findCursor(page); if(!cur) return;
    ctx.save(); ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.68)'; ctx.fillRect(cur.x+2, cur.y+1, Math.max(2,canvas.width*.0024), cur.h-2); ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawQuickGlitch(img, pageElapsed){
    const t = clamp(pageElapsed / config.glitchPulseMs, 0, 1);
    if (t >= 1) return;
    const punch = Math.sin(Math.PI * t);
    const w=canvas.width,h=canvas.height;
    ctx.save();

    // A short monitor-flash: strong but clean, not dirty or long.
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.22 + 0.30 * punch;
    ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,.85)';
    ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);

    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.34 + 0.20 * punch;
    const split = 6 + 18 * punch;
    ctx.drawImage(img, split, 0, w, h);
    ctx.drawImage(img, -split, 0, w, h);

    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.58 * punch;
    for(let i=0;i<5;i++){
      const y = Math.random()*h;
      const sliceH = 6 + Math.random()*18;
      const dx = (Math.random()-.5) * (54 + 120*punch);
      ctx.drawImage(img,0,y,w,sliceH,dx,y,w,sliceH);
    }

    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.32 * punch;
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,.75)';
    for(let i=0;i<3;i++){
      ctx.fillRect(0, Math.random()*h, w, 2+Math.random()*5);
    }

    ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawAlienOverlay(page, layer, exitT){
    if(!layer) return;
    const alpha=(1-exitT)*.78;
    if(alpha<=0) return;
    const scaleX=canvas.width/page.pdfWidth, scaleY=canvas.height/page.pdfHeight;
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha=alpha;
    ctx.fillStyle='rgba(60,60,60,.62)';
    ctx.textBaseline='top';
    for(const line of layer.lines){
      const x=line.x*scaleX + Math.sin(performance.now()/75 + line.jitter)*3;
      const y=line.y*scaleY;
      const fontSize=line.fontSize*((scaleX+scaleY)/2);
      ctx.font=`${fontSize}px ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, monospace`;
      ctx.fillText(line.text,x,y,line.width*scaleX);
      if(Math.random()<.35){
        ctx.globalAlpha=alpha*.28;
        ctx.fillText(line.text,x+(Math.random()-.5)*18,y+(Math.random()-.5)*7,line.width*scaleX);
        ctx.globalAlpha=alpha;
      }
    }
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function drawTextAfterimage(img, exitT){
    const w=canvas.width,h=canvas.height;
    const ghost = Math.max(0, 1 - exitT);
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'multiply';
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.14 * ghost;
    ctx.drawImage(img, 5 + 10*exitT, 0, w, h);
    ctx.drawImage(img, -4 - 8*exitT, 1, w, h);
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.09 * ghost;
    ctx.drawImage(img, 0, 3 + 8*exitT, w, h);
    ctx.restore();
    ctx.save();
    ctx.globalAlpha = 0.72 * exitT;
    ctx.fillStyle = '#fff';
    ctx.fillRect(0,0,w,h);
    ctx.restore();
  }

  function updateProgress(){ const total=PAGES.length||1; const pagePart=currentIndex/total; const local=clamp((performance.now()-phaseStart)/phaseDuration,0,1)/total; progressBar.style.width=`${Math.min(100,(pagePart+local)*100)}%`; }

  function enterFullscreen(){ const el=document.documentElement; if(el.requestFullscreen) el.requestFullscreen().catch(()=>{}); }
  function startSequence(withAudio){ enterFullscreen();
    if (withAudio) ensureAudio();
    audioEnabled=!!withAudio;
    overlay.classList.add('hidden'); miniControls.classList.remove('hidden');
    currentIndex=0; paused=false; beginPage(0); loop();
  }
  function finishSequence(){
    paused=true; overlay.classList.remove('hidden');
    document.querySelector('#overlay h1').textContent='재생이 완료되었습니다';
    document.querySelector('#overlay p').innerHTML='v10 exhibition fullscreen HTML 시안의 전체 재생이 끝났습니다.<br>반복 재생 버전입니다.';
    startBtn.textContent='다시 시작 / 소리 포함'; muteBtn.textContent='무음으로 다시 보기'; progressBar.style.width='100%'; statusLabel.textContent='[SYSTEM] reconnect complete';
  }

  function advancePageNow(){
    if (isOverlayVisible()) { ensureAudio(); startSequence(true); return; }
    if (paused) return;
    if (phase === 'exit') return;
    statusLabel.textContent='[SYSTEM] manual advance';
    setPhase('exit', config.manualExitMs);
  }

  function goToNextAfterExit(){
    currentIndex += 1;
    if(currentIndex>=PAGES.length){
      currentIndex = 0;
      beginPage(currentIndex);
      return;
    }
    beginPage(currentIndex);
  }

  function loop(){
    cancelAnimationFrame(rafId); rafId=requestAnimationFrame(loop); if(paused) return;
    const page=PAGES[currentIndex], img=images[currentIndex], alien=alienLayers[currentIndex]; if(!page||!img) return;
    const now=performance.now(); const phaseT=clamp((now-phaseStart)/phaseDuration,0,1); const pageElapsed=now-pageStartTime;
    let visibleChars=page.charCount||0; let exitT=0;

    if(phase==='cover'){
      visibleChars = page.charCount||0;
      if(phaseT>=1){ statusLabel.textContent='[SYSTEM] cover exit'; setPhase('exit', config.exitMs); }
    } else if(phase==='typing'){
      visibleChars=getVisibleChars(page, phaseT);
      const diff=visibleChars-lastRevealedChars;
      if(diff>0){ playTypeClick(); lastRevealedChars=visibleChars; }
      if(phaseT>=1){ statusLabel.textContent='[SYSTEM] sentence complete'; setPhase('hold',currentHoldMs); }
    } else if(phase==='hold'){
      visibleChars=page.charCount||0; if(phaseT>=1){ statusLabel.textContent='[SYSTEM] afterimage'; setPhase('exit',config.exitMs); }
    } else if(phase==='exit'){
      visibleChars=page.charCount||0; exitT=easeInOutQuad(phaseT);
      if(phaseT>=1){ goToNextAfterExit(); return; }
    }

    drawBasePage(page,img,visibleChars);
    if(currentIndex > 0 && pageElapsed < config.glitchPulseMs && phase !== 'exit') drawQuickGlitch(img,pageElapsed);
    if(phase==='exit'){ drawTextAfterimage(img,exitT); drawAlienOverlay(page,alien,exitT); }
    drawCursorAfterComplete(page,now);
    updateProgress();
  }

  startBtn.addEventListener('click',()=>startSequence(true));
  muteBtn.addEventListener('click',()=>startSequence(false));
  pauseBtn.addEventListener('click',()=>{ paused=!paused; pauseBtn.textContent=paused?'재생':'일시정지'; if(paused) pauseStarted=performance.now(); else { const offset=performance.now()-pauseStarted; phaseStart+=offset; pageStartTime+=offset; } });
  restartBtn.addEventListener('click',()=>startSequence(audioEnabled));
  document.addEventListener('keydown',(e)=>{ if(e.code==='Space'){ e.preventDefault(); advancePageNow(); } });
  stage.addEventListener('pointerdown',(e)=>{ if(e.target && e.target.closest && e.target.closest('button')) return; if(!isOverlayVisible()) advancePageNow(); });

  preloadImages().then(()=>{ if(images[0]) resizeCanvasToImage(images[0]); drawBasePage(PAGES[0],images[0],PAGES[0].charCount||0); }).catch(err=>{ console.error(err); statusLabel.textContent='[SYSTEM] asset load failed'; });
})();
</script>
</body>
</html>
